jobs.title: Gen-AI产品经理
jobs.company: 上海瑞霖贸易有限公司
jobs.summary: Real page summary: own Gen-AI product planning and roadmap design across LLM, Agent, multimodal, RAG, enterprise knowledge base and knowledge graph use cases; expected to use Prompt Engineering, System Prompt design, Dify, Coze, low-code AI workflows, and AI platform product delivery with hands-on prototyping.
